title: eria bicolor
intro: Eria bicolor, also known as the 'Golden Yellow Orchid', is a flowering plant species belonging to the family Orchidaceae. It has been traditionally used in Ayurvedic medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing stress and anxiety, improving digestion, and aiding in the treatment of respiratory issues. Eria bicolor can be prepared into herbal remedies like teas, decoctions, and capsules, making it a popular natural remedy in traditional medicine.
